{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041816092D8DAF546A7D88C95E"}"},"total":13497},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7002098598444483331","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的可以，这才是皇帝，不像其他小说的皇帝到处打怪夺宝，帝者本应该高卧九重天，笑看风云变幻","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":38,"text":"笑看风云","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%91%E7%9C%8B%E9%A3%8E%E4%BA%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742106967D88C95E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227002098598444483331%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226976809200374516744%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%91%E7%9C%8B%E9%A3%8E%E4%BA%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630303127,"group_id":"6976809200374516744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0cZVxMcm1Mszv6zEnZvMOo2dnyXK9BWBX3sVJQUgwx9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2722014118311188","user_name":"正北的杨不凡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2722014118311188","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6976809200374516744","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越玄幻世界，成为皇朝最弱皇子。
　　玄明本打算放弃争夺帝位，日后做个逍遥王爷。
　　不料，先帝修行神魔秘法，需要假死一段时间，为了容易将帝位拿回来，故意传给最弱的他。
　　消息一出，朝野震动，皇朝风起云涌，各地暗流涌动。
　　恰在这时，万界召唤系统激活。
　　开局召唤神魔坐镇皇都，震惊朝野。
　　一年后，先帝突破神魔境，欲君临天下。
　　却发现一群神魔士兵围住了自己！
